'''Antyard-Wo Shissan''' was one of six in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force involved in the [[Roshu Sune/Legends|Roshu Sune]] [[Gotal hostage standoff|hostage standoff]] on [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
The Jedi attempted to negotiate with the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] guerrillas responsible for the release of the hostages, but when rogue vigilantes opened fire on the guerrillas, the guerrillas panicked and opened fire on their captives. Antyard-Wo Shissan was one of two Jedi killed in the crossfire, the other being [[Kaloor Cofi]]. The four surviving Jedi included a [[Unidentified Mon Calamari Jedi Knight|Mon Calamari Jedi Knight]] and task force leader [[Sarrissa Jeng/Legends|Sarrissa Jeng]]. Though the Jedi were criticized by [[Gotal Foreign Affairs Commune]] leader [[Shagrad Loset]] for what he saw as meddling in an internal affair, their heroism was commended by [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] member [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]. Funerals for Cofi and Shissan were held at the nearest [[Jedi chapter house (Aleen Minor)|Jedi chapter house]] on [[Aleen Minor/Legends|Aleen Minor]].
